exports.name: Storefront
exports.signature: service Storefront uses http, db.read, db.write

exports.name: get_products
exports.signature: fn get_products() -> List[Product] uses http, db.read

exports.name: get_product
exports.signature: fn get_product(id: ProductId) -> Result[Product, CatalogError] uses http, db.read

exports.name: post_checkout
exports.signature: fn post_checkout(cart: Cart) -> Result[Order, CheckoutError] uses http, db.write
